item.title: Finally a billionaire does the right thing.
item.dc:creator: fartyandbloated

item.title: JustGirlyThingz Meme Dump
item.description:
Imgur needs more female gaze memes...
...so here I am.
See a need,
fill a need.
This is my first Imgur post!
But even if no one else sees these memes...
...now I have one more repository for my favs.
Win/win as far as I'm concerned.
Some of these have been on my phone for ages.
And I shan't pretend I'm "clearing my phone"
The Fail Whale seems pretty angry, y'all.
An OG meme, fresh from my brain. Please steal.
Ha ha! Surprise educational moment. Google her.
A classic.
I support the above message.
I'm 40, so I also collect memes "the kids" make!
Smug baby goat is a 2024 mood, tbh
We aren't sorry.
But we will listen to our enemies cry again!
I'm sure this is cross-stitched for real somewhere.
Sometimes....
Yeah, that.
And yet!
The horrors persist, but so do we.
The cobra chickens have about had it.
As have the L'Otters.
Hmmmmm...seems bad. Not my business!
Listen to the old Nanas.
They are the way.
Ladies?
It's time.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
OG meme, fresh from my brain. Please steal.
.
.
Darwyn Cooke, ladies and gentlemen!
.
.
.
~fin~
item.dc:creator: DeviousPrincessKing

item.title: If a woman approaches you acting like she knows you, there's probably a reason for it, hear her out folks...
item.description: Edit : Someone replied to a comment I made about me saying I know this isn't a woman only thing, telling me to STFU, that I did infer it was just a woman thing... However then they muted me so I couldn't respond.... So for anyone thinking the same... I absolutely know this isn't a woman only problem! I've also shared plenty of posts about men's mh, about men in DV situations ( I've even been called an incel for that!) I share posts, of all kinds, and they all have the best intent... And ones like this, are not jumping on one gender or another! But life is shit, bad things happen and good people want to know how to help, so that's why I shared this, it might help someone! It's not saying it doesn't happen to men, I absolutely know it does and I would never ever say otherwise!...
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: He was eating somebody else’s leftovers but she took them away and brought him fresh food❤️
item.dc:creator: OhMyYoureSexxy

item.title: Here's hoping that the Congress will soon get it...
item.dc:creator: BeenThereSeenThat

item.title: It was my 11th cakeday, so here's some random stuff from my phone dump.
item.description:
Cat tax, as per the rules. I'm not about to get imgur audited!
More cat tax! I really hope those videos have sound, otherwise im gonna feel dumb. It's been an interesting 11 years. I've laughed, I've cried, I've recounted work stories and screamed into the void about medical bullshittery. You're all weirdos and I hope you all never change. Most Viral Edit: Thanks everyone! You're all fantastic, and I hope that 2024 is your year!
item.dc:creator: Hymeria

item.title: If nobody saw, did it happen?
item.description: A guy standing in line after me in the supermarket bought a single pack of instant noodles. At 9.30 pm. When leaving the store, I absolutely did NOT see him picking up some cabbage. Never happened. Must be some rare medical issue, where you go blind for just 3 seconds
item.dc:creator: jekath

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I designed this infographic (pt 2)
item.description: Reposting my repost because I was being lazy and using the version thats already been posted. I created the original of this (but we changed the cover, and for some reason I didn't put the final version on my computer). I'm amazed at how often its reposted, and it always makes me laugh because it was so boring to design. FYI I have nothing to do with the content on my infographics. Just design.
item.dc:creator: snidelid

item.title: Love me some end stage capitalism
item.description: Seriously, who wants to visit a a fast food joint when the pricing could be unknown and quite disagreeable?

item.description: Wendy's is a joke
item.dc:creator: justpullnpray

item.title: Pro tip: Don't adjust your ladder while standing on it
item.dc:creator: Igotfourbedrats

item.title: Greedflation Changing Buying Habbits
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/inflation-consumers-price-gouging-spending-economy-999e81e2f869a0151e2ee6bbb63370af Two weeks ago the regular price for one Starbucks bottle Frappuccino had risen to $6.99, nearly doubled pre-pandemic prices. This week, the price dropped back down to $3.99 a bottle with a sale price of $2.99. People are changing their spending habits long term because of the high prices, but dropping prices alone won't help name brands because of other economic stressors on consumers. If the trend of less government/more unregulated business standards continues, we will see more market volatility. Also, "consumer push back" is an interesting way of saying being bled dry financially.
item.dc:creator: MAN9000

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have. Wednesday meme dump
item.description:
1. Yeah it's Russia...
2. Be shocked? Also do you like mustard? It tastes kind of weird to me?
3. When you realize you're being filmed
4. Whatever wacky shenanigans these two are into, I am in
5
6. "Granny, you can't win a trick like that" Granny:
7. Why does this gif of food feels so dirty?
8. Chivalry...
9. Did this guy just cast a water spell?!
10. Me arriving late to a party
11. Scroll down to the list
12. I actually have seen like one or two of these. Are they really that scary?
13
14. Watch gators die inside. Turtle: "Guys, and then I ran fast! Like Usain Bolt!
15. Thank you for making it to the end of the dump! Now dance! P.S. Hope this dump entertained you, if you liked the humor, you might want to check out my "Stanley Parable" inspired game called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)". Wishlisting is the best way to support us small indie devs: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ THANK YOU!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
